calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Steven A. Booska, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Company.
No appearance by defendants John Lee Hudson or Shana Hudson.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 23, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 23, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 3, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Company, and against the Defaulted Defendants John Lee Hudson and Shana Hudson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $208,178.89.
Prejudgment Interest - $29,883.72.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $415.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $239,477.61.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
